name: Prism MCP API Server Connector
description: Exposes and binds third-party REST APIs to the active PRISM MCP (Model Context Protocol) network, generating structured server adapters.

covenant_rules: Always validate target OpenAPI JSON/YAML formatting schemas before generating adapter files.
Isolate third-party server credentials securely within the PRISM IAM credentials vault.
Verify connection latency metrics are within operational caps before enabling the server adapter.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Evaluate the target REST API OpenAPI schema and network constraints for: {query}. Verify zero malicious routing injection patterns exist.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Draft high-fidelity Node.js/TypeScript MCP server schemas, tool registration mapping configurations, and error handlers for: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Coordinate server binding. Fetch OpenAPI manifests, generate structured server files, establish safe network clearance, and test active connection adapters: {query}.

steps.name: Parse OpenAPI Schema Specs
steps.action: Download or read the target Swagger/OpenAPI spec mapping paths, parameters, and credentials requirements.

steps.name: Scaffold MCP Server Node
steps.action: Generate TypeScript codebase files defining the new MCP server and registering REST routes as tools.

steps.name: Verify Adapter Integration
steps.action: Trigger connection tests with test requests to ensure endpoint responses parse seamlessly.

steps.name: MCP Server Exposed Successfully
steps.action: Expose the newly generated MCP tools to the active PRISM model selector hub and alert the developer.
